q1.content: We're now going to move to a new topic. Have you ever worked with or known someone at work from another country? What was your experience like?
q1.requirement: Understand whether the interviewee has worked with or known someone from another country. If they have, ask them specifics questions about their experience working with them and what it was like. If they have not, ask them if they have friends or family who are from another country, or they themselves are from another country. If they know someone from another country, ask them about that relationship and what it was like.
